title: Experimental Emergency Teleportation
description: Find the point in range of the most nanobots via 3D spatial subdivision.
writeup:
## Approach

Parse nanobot positions and signal radii (Manhattan distance).

## Part 1

Find the strongest nanobot, count how many others are within its radius.

## Part 2

Use octree-style spatial subdivision: start with a bounding box, split into 8 sub-boxes, and use a priority queue ordered by (-bots_in_range, box_size, distance_to_origin). When we pop a size-1 box, its distance to the origin is the answer.
